pi_items.source: Consistent across task.json description, setup_task.sh (line 6), and export_result.sh (line 6)
Matches task description and export_result.sh validation script (line 63). All 6 layer names are required for the grain facility site plan.
Task description states: 'Four circles, Radius 10. Centers at: (0,0), (60,0), (0,60), (60,60).' Verified in export_result.sh analysis script (line 70).
Task description states: 'Four circles, Radius 10.' Verified in export_result.sh DXF analysis (line 75): abs(circle.dxf.radius - 10) < 2.0
Task description states: 'A 10x10 rectangle centered at (30,30).' Verified in export_result.sh analysis script (line 111) which expects center = (30,30).

privileged_info_summary: This is a synthetic LibreCAD drawing task with no external datasets. The task requires creating a grain storage facility site plan with 6 specific layers (BINS, STRUCTURES, ROADS, CONVEYOR, TEXT, DIMENSIONS), containing 4 circular bins with radius 10 at centers (0,0), (60,0), (0,60), (60,60), a rectangular dump pit centered at (30,30), access road, conveyor lines, text labels, and dimensions. The output file must be saved to /home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/grain_facility.dxf.
